subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-10-13
subcodes.first_line: But now after the lapse of many centuries, his highness, the Almighty, has again looked upon them
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Manifestation of God as sun, @martyrs and martyrdom, @growth of the Cause
